SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Admin
Represents an administrator in the system.
AdminFrame
Admin dashboard window.
Booking
Represents a booking record linking a User, a Classroom, date and time.
BookingException
Custom exception for errors that occur in the Classroom Booking System.
BookingSystem
Core logic of the Classroom Booking System.
Classroom
Represents a classroom in the booking system.
DatabaseManager
Manages all SQLite database operations for the Classroom Booking System.
LoginFrame
Login and Registration window.
Main
Entry point for the Classroom Booking System.
Manageable
Interface that defines management operations.
Person
Abstract base class for all persons in the system.
User
Represents a regular user (student/staff) in the system.
UserFrame
Main dashboard window for regular Users.
